summary: Iteration 86: Complete testing of NEW CRA features - Notifications System, App Version Control, and Family ID Authentication. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages verified with correct components.

issues: Urgency popup (Stock limitado) appears on all pages and blocks interactions - this is an existing global popup that may need a close button or should not appear on gestion pages

notifications_system.get_notifications: PASSED - Returns notificaciones array and no_leidas count
notifications_system.pedido_creates_notification: PASSED - New pedido creates notification for admin role
notifications_system.low_stock_notification: PASSED - Stock update <5 qty creates notification for comerciales
notifications_system.installer_assignment_notification: PASSED - Assigning installer creates notification for that specific installer

app_version_control.get_app_versions: PASSED - Returns versions for all apps
app_version_control.update_version_admin: PASSED - Admin can update app version

familia_id_auth.login_success: PASSED - Login with familia_id + email + password
familia_id_auth.password_reset_flow: PASSED - Full flow: request reset -> get token -> reset -> login with new password

frontend_pages.comerciales_notification_bell: PASSED - NotificationBell visible with notification count badge
frontend_pages.comerciales_update_checker: PASSED - Shows 'Nueva versión disponible: v1.1.0' banner
frontend_pages.admin_notification_bell: PASSED - NotificationBell in mobile header (hidden on desktop due to sidebar layout)

critical_code_review_comments: Email delivery for password reset is logged to console only (MOCKED) - SendGrid not configured for familia password reset emails
The urgency popup (Stock limitado) appears globally and may need to be excluded from /gestion/* routes

test_credentials.familia_test_user: Use strong password like X7mK#pQ9vL$2w for registration

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed data (pedidos, instalaciones, familia users) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features for CRA management tested and working: 1) Notifications system auto-generates alerts for new pedidos (to admin), low stock (to comerciales), and installer assignments (to specific installer). 2) App version control allows admin to set version, and /app-versions/check returns update_available correctly. UpdateChecker component shows banner when update available. 3) Family ID auth system allows registration, login, and password reset with strong password validation. Email delivery is MOCKED (console log).

mocked_apis_list: Email delivery for familia password reset - logs to console instead of sending email via SendGrid

features_verified: POST /api/gestion/auth/login - works for comercial, admin, instalador
GET /api/gestion/notificaciones - returns notifications filtered by user role/id
Auto-notification: installer assignment -> specific installer notification
PUT /api/gestion/app-versions/{app} - admin can update version (creates notification for role)
POST /api/auth/familia/register - register with familia_id + strong password
POST /api/auth/familia/login - login with familia_id + email + password
Role access: instalador denied creating pedidos (403)
Frontend: UpdateChecker shows update banner when available
